description: Edge: Player at critical HP (<30%), multiple threshold cards active

enemy.name: The Plagiarist
enemy.special: onEnemyTurnStart: from turn 4+, gains +1 Strength each turn. Currently turn 7, has 3 stacks.

hand.name: Emergency
hand.description: Gain block. DOUBLE if HP below 30%. Player at 17.5% HP — doubles! QP=4, CC=12.

hand.name: Execute
hand.description: Bonus damage below 30% enemy HP. Enemy at 73% — NO bonus yet.

hand.name: Lifetap
hand.description: Deal damage. Heal 20% of damage dealt.

hand.name: Overheal
hand.description: Gain 10 block. DOUBLE if HP below 50%. Player at 17.5% — doubles! QP=10, CC=30.

hand.name: Reckless
hand.description: High damage, self-damage (3 HP). At 14 HP, self-damage leaves 11 HP then enemy hits for 8+Str3=11... death?

relics.name: Last Breath
relics.description: Once per run, survive a killing blow with 1 HP.

notes: EDGE CASE: Player at 14 HP (< 30% of 80 = 24 HP). Both Emergency and Overheal trigger double effects. Reckless would leave player at 11, then enemy hits for 8+Strength3 = 11+ multiplier. Last Breath relic can save once. Execute gets no bonus (enemy at 73%). Overheal (doubled) = 20 block for 2 AP blocks the incoming 11+dmg. Emergency (doubled) = 12 block for 1 AP. These thresholds make this state rich with double-effect synergies. Is there a dominant defensive play?
